objective: Define product KPI contract and implement Phase-1 UX simplification for TheDivineParadox: prioritize plain-language copy, single primary action flow, and post-vote next-step cue while preserving deterministic governance constraints and traceability.
constraints: Preserve deterministic behavior for verdict-critical paths.
Preserve traceability with hash-referenced evidence and prompt/version refs.
Fallback path must remain available for external-model failures.
CI must gate merge on validation and deterministic tests.
